summary: Completed testing of PITCH'D iteration 6 - All new features verified working: 1) Logo image loads correctly with PITCH'D brand image and subtitle, 2) Short script flow (200-999 chars) works without upgrade banner, 3) Script flow 1000+ chars works without upgrade banner (no truncation), 4) PDF download via blob method works correctly, 5) Promo modal appears after PDF download with PITCHD25 code and correct links, 6) Genre/tone/setting metadata pills display correctly, 7) Backend /api/analyse endpoint works, 8) Upgrade banner data-testid='upgrade-banner' exists in code but correctly NOT rendered when wasTruncated is false.
critical_code_review_comments: TRUNCATE_LIMIT = 100000 correctly defined in pitchdApi.js and used in Pitchd.jsx to set wasTruncated state
UpgradeBanner component has correct data-testid='upgrade-banner' and only renders when wasTruncated prop is true
Logo.jsx correctly uses customer-assets URL for PITCH'D brand image with subtitle 'A Shadow Wolves Productions Tool'
triggerDownload() function correctly implements manual blob download pattern for PDF export
Backend server.py truncates at 100000 chars in build_script_user_prompt(text[:100000])
test_credentials: None required - no authentication in this app
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 verified all new features: 1) Logo - Uses brand image from https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_pitch-d-preview/artifacts/c6siayzj_Pitch%27d%20Logo%20-%20Transparent.png with subtitle. 2) Truncation - Scripts >100K chars are truncated before API call, wasTruncated state set to true. 3) Upgrade Banner - Only shows when wasTruncated=true (script was >100K chars), has data-testid='upgrade-banner', teal background, SLATR features list, CTA buttons to www.slatr.com.au. 4) PDF - Uses blob download method (triggerDownload function). 5) Promo Modal - Shows after PDF download with PITCHD25 code, SLATR link (www.slatr.com.au), SPOT'D link (www.getspotd.app). Note: Cannot easily test 100K+ char input via Playwright, but backend truncation verified via curl.

metadata_pills.tone: PASS - Tone label and value displayed
metadata_pills.setting: PASS - Setting label and value displayed
metadata_pills.period: PASS - Period label and value displayed

backend_api.analyse_endpoint: PASS - /api/analyse works for both concept and script modes
